description: ISBNdb provides a database of book metadata searchable by ISBN, title, author, publisher, and subject. It offers subscription access to this catalog for developers and data users.
summary: ISBNdb exposes authenticated REST HTTP APIs for book metadata: a current v2 API at `https://api2.isbndb.com` using an `Authorization` header API key, plus a legacy/discontinued v1 API documented with an OpenAPI spec and `x-api-key` header auth.
